markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Refine content strategy and align on a new publishing goal.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Goal:** Publish 20 articles in two weeks to accelerate performance testing.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [**Content Focus:** Prioritize competitor ("vs.") and country guides; deprioritize foundational topics.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=2711.0)
  - [**Persona Shift:** Country guides will target a strategic business owner, not a compliance expert, to focus on actionable payment insights.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
  - [**Key Constraints:** Never discuss fees (which are bespoke), and frame high-risk topics as "complex industries" to broaden appeal.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Publishing Goal

  - [**Goal:** Publish 20 articles in two weeks to increase "shots on goal" and accelerate performance testing.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [**Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=2480.0)
    1.  [**Competitor Blogs:** "vs." articles are performing well and align with the LLM's strengths.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
    2.  [**Country Guides:** Refine these articles to be more strategic and less regulatory.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
    3.  [**ISO/Payfac Content:** Develop topics for these key audiences.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=2445.0)
  - [**Deprioritized:** Foundational articles (e.g., "Gateway vs. Processor") will be published as is to clear the backlog and focus resources on new priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=2711.0)

### Competitor Blog Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Titles like "Rapyd vs. Stripe for high-opportunity businesses" use internal jargon ("high-opportunity") that lacks SEO value and narrows the audience.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [**Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
      - [**Title:** Use broad, SEO-friendly titles (e.g., "Rapyd vs. Stripe").](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
      - [**Content:** Include a subsection on "complex" or "highly regulated industries" (e.g., iGaming, forex).](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This structure broadens appeal while still addressing a key segment. It also provides flexibility, as Rapyd's risk appetite for these industries can change abruptly.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)

### Country Guide Strategy (UK Article Review)

  - [**Problem:** The UK guide was overly focused on regulatory minutiae, which is not Rapyd's expertise and burdens the review process.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [**Solution:** Shift the persona from a compliance expert to a strategic business owner focused on market entry and payment acceptance.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
  - [**Key Directives:**](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
      - [**Avoid Regulatory Advice:** Do not provide guidance on business administration (e.g., registering with Company House).](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
      - [**Focus on Actionable Strategy:** Cover topics like:](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
          - [Consumer payment preferences (online vs. in-store, mobile vs. contactless).](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
          - [Localization best practices (checkout, currency, support).](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=1849.0)
          - [Trust-building tactics for e-commerce.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=2061.0)
      - [**Never Discuss Fees:** Fees are bespoke and negotiated per client.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
          - [**Allowed:** General statements about fee drivers (e.g., "higher fees for non-local acquirers post-Brexit").](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
          - [**Not Allowed:** Numerical figures, interchange rates, or comparative pricing.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
      - [**Clarify Local Acquiring:** Explain that local acquiring is a benefit for specific use cases (e.g., international corps with local entities, payment partners using Rapyd's license), not a universal requirement.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)

### ISO & Payfac Audience Definition

  - [**ISO (Independent Sales Organization):** A partner that identifies merchants and resells Rapyd's services. Rapyd handles merchant onboarding and liability.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=2823.0)
  - [**Payfac (Payment Facilitator):** A partner that uses Rapyd's infrastructure but handles its own merchant onboarding and assumes liability. This requires the Payfac to be a regulated payment company with its own licensing and compliance team.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=2823.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=2743.0)
      - [Revise all "vs." articles to use broad titles and add a "complex industries" subsection.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=2743.0)
      - [Revise country guides to focus on strategic payment insights, removing regulatory details and fee discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=2743.0)
      - [Send Mark an artifact defining the ISO and Payfac personas by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=2776.0)
  - [**Rapyd:**](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=2388.0)
      - [Continue reviewing the current content queue, including LATAM articles, to meet the 20-article goal.](https://fathom.video/share/kztGm3e5DdzXW4fdgSd-HmwVyHyX17W3?tab=summary&timestamp=2388.0)
